stories.title: Pack's Jacobs facing domestic violence charges
stories.summary: Packers running back Josh Jacobs was arrested Tuesday and booked on several domestic violence charges, according to the Hobart-Lawrence (Wisconsin) Police Department.

stories.title: Sources: NCAA denies Sorsby's reinstatement bid
stories.summary: The NCAA has denied Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's request for reinstatement, putting his lawsuit against the NCAA seeking an injunction for his eligibility for the 2026 season into further focus.

stories.title: Chargers make James highest-paid safety again
stories.summary: The Chargers and Derwin James Jr. agreed to a three-year, $75.6 million contract extension, making him the highest-paid safety for the second time in his career, his agent David Mulugheta told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Tuesday.

stories.title: Hammon stands by Brunson take: Prove me wrong
stories.summary: Aces coach Becky Hammon didn't completely back down from her assertion that a player of Jalen Brunson's stature could lead a team to an NBA title, saying Brunson will have to prove her wrong.

stories.title: Sources: Atkinson to return as Cavs head coach
stories.summary: Kenny Atkinson will return next season as the Cleveland Cavaliers coach, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.
